title: matthiola incana subsp. incana
intro: Matthiola incana subsp. incana, also known as Hoary Stock, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Matthiola incana subsp. incana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
